notes: Queens Community House official program page for the S.E.V.E.N Family Enrichment Center in Jackson Heights. Cover image is the program carousel JPEG on qchnyc.org, downloaded and re-hosted via POST /api/ingest/upload.
missingOrUncertain: Specific workshop dates and drop-in hours are not listed on the program landing page; contact the center to confirm current family activities and enrollment.
ageRange set to All ages because the FEC describes family-wide support rather than a single child age band on the cited page.
cadence set to Monthly as a planning label for recurring workshops and family activities; actual schedule varies by program.

document.name: Queens Community House — S.E.V.E.N Family Enrichment Center
document.description:
The S.E.V.E.N Family Enrichment Center (FEC) is a Queens Community House program in Jackson Heights offering a welcoming space for neighborhood families. The official program page describes parenting resources, educational workshops, family activities, and personalized assistance aimed at connection, empowerment, and stability, with services co-designed with participating families.

Published contact details: 87-10 Northern Boulevard, Suite 202, Jackson Heights, NY 11372; main line 917-858-2180; Director Tiffany Nunez at 917-724-9279, tnunez@qchnyc.org.

Sources: https://qchnyc.org/programs/adult-and-family-services/family-enrichment-center https://qchnyc.org/programs/adult-and-family-services/
